Describe the initial preparation steps shown for the artichoke, including the text instructions and actions performed on the stem.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the title 'How to COOK AND EAT an ARTICHOKE' appears beside a real vegetable; at 2s, a woman holds the artichoke while text highlights fiber and antioxidants; at 10s, instructions to remove stem and excess leaves display; at 14s, a knife cuts the stem on a beige cutting board.
